prompt: 이미 slides.md가 있는데 npx slidev export로 PDF 내보내기가 안 돼. 에러 메시지가 'Cannot find module playwright-chromium'이라고 나와. 해결 방법 알려줘. 그리고 Claude Code Bash에서 dev server를 백그라운드로 띄우는 방법도 알려줘.

assertions.name: playwright-install-command
assertions.description: Provides the correct playwright-chromium install command

assertions.name: tty-problem-explained
assertions.description: Explains WHY the dev server dies in background (TTY issue)
assertions.check: mentions TTY or pseudo-terminal or interactive stdin issue

assertions.name: polling-pattern
assertions.description: Shows how to wait for server to be ready (curl polling)
assertions.check: contains curl polling loop or wait-for-ready pattern

assertions.name: exit-code-143
assertions.description: Explains that exit code 143 from kill is normal
assertions.check: mentions exit code 143 or SIGTERM as expected/normal

assertions.name: failing-patterns-warned
assertions.description: Warns about patterns that don't work (plain &, nohup)
assertions.check: mentions that simple & or nohup won't work
